item.title: UTM
item.description: Graphics Paravirtualized Graphics only work for Apple Silicon Macs. https://github.com/utmapp/UTM/issues/3491 Default QEMU VirGL backend on macOS is virtio-gpu-gl-pci.

item.title: Path MTU Discovery
item.description: IP Layer IPv4 Use ping <addr> -M do -s 8000 on Linux to prohibit fragmentation and conduct PMTUD (Path MTU Discovery). $ ping 1.1 -M do -s 8000 PING 1.

item.title: ICMP ping packet size
item.description: There are 8 bytes of ICMP header and 20 bytes of IPv4 or 40 bytes of IPv6 header for an Echo Request, so with -s of 8000, each ICMPv6 packet is actually 8048=40+8+8000 bytes, and for ICMP it’s typically 8028=20+8+8000 bytes.

item.title: Azure Network Idle Timeout
item.description: public IP: 4-30 minutes adjustable inbound, 4 minutes fixed outbound. LB: adjustable, 4-100 minutes. Default is 4 minutes. If you set idle timeout to a large value, you risk reaching the VM connection limit.

item.title: Linux Distributions Adoption Statistics
item.description: Fedora REPL Spec: https://docs.fedoraproject.org/en-US/infra/sysadmin_guide/dnf-counting/ Data: https://data-analysis.fedoraproject.org/ openSUSE https://metrics.

item.title: IP and BGP ASN Data Lookup Services
item.description: Web Global Hurricane Electric BGP Toolkit https://bgp.tools/ can discover recursive DNS (“local DNS”) resolver IPs. https://speed.cloudflare.com/ and https://radar.

item.title: Nix Channel Status
item.description: View channel freshness on https://status.nixos.org/. nixpkgs-unstable can be a few days old. For Nix channel freshness history, check out https://monitoring.

item.title: Building an RPM package from source
Create .ipa files without a developer account
item.description: Archive the target Right-click the archive and click “Show in Finder” Right-click the .xcarchive file and click “Show Package Contents” Go into the Products folder Rename Applications to Payload Right-click the Payload folder and click “Compress …” Renamed the generated .

item.title: col
item.description: Convert Tabs to Spaces ethtool -l eth0 | col -x converts tabs to spaces with proper indentation.
